title: Pentas lindenioides
taxonomy: Pentas lindenioides is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is commonly known as a member of the genus Pentas, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae. Pentas lindenioides is further classified into the order Gentianales, which comprises a group of flowering plant families including Apocynaceae. This classification places Pentas lindenioides within the clade of flowering plants that have a characteristic flower structure. At the most basic level, Pentas lindenioides is a member of the kingdom Plantae.

intro: Pentas lindenioides, also known as Star Cluster or Lindeni Pentas, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Pentas genus within the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in African folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Pentas lindenioides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Pentas lindenioides is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of a tincture, to treat various health ailments.
